title: **The Tomorrow Program Tier III (S)** _A hedonistic association of notable Hold lots of parties. Cover for extortion, murder, and reality crimes._
_A hedonistic association of notable scientists, writers, artists, and dreamers. Hold lots of parties. Cover for extortion, murder, and reality crimes._
`Complete the Catalyst Engine` **8** `Create a mega anomaly` **12**

**Paradigm:** You are given your own artifact made of pure alluvium ore, engineered by Dr. Blackburn. When you push yourself, you can also do one of the following: _unleash a stroke of lightning as a weapon—summon a storm in your immediate vicinity (torrential rain, roaring winds, heavy fog, chilling frost/snow, etc.)._
`Figure out who the assassin is` **12** `Kill the assassin` **8**
_A profiteering pharmaceutical company that churns out pills of every kind and flavor—Dizzy Drops, Smiletime, Go-Go Pills, you name it._
`Perfect the  Model Worker Pill` **8** `Destroy  Charterhall University` **10**
